task_completion.visual_evidence: The Thunderbird Address Book window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Locate contacts belonging to the Legal department.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Address Book list view shows contacts with 'Legal' in the Department column, possibly through sorting by department or using the search bar.

task_completion.description: Open the edit dialog for a Legal department contact.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A contact properties or edit dialog box is open for at least one contact belonging to the Legal department.

task_completion.description: Update the email domain of Legal department contacts to '@enron-legal.com'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email addresses of contacts in the 'Legal' department are visible with the new domain '@enron-legal.com' in the Address Book list view.

task_completion.description: Ensure contacts in other departments retain the original domain '@enron.com'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email addresses of contacts in departments other than 'Legal' are visible in the Address Book list view and still end with the original domain '@enron.com'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Thunderbird GUI to update the contacts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Thunderbird Address Book interface (e.g., editing contacts via dialog boxes), rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Thunderbird application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Thunderbird application window is clearly visible, not a text editor or SQLite database browser modifying backend files.

integrity.description: The local parts of the email addresses remain unchanged.
integrity.visual_evidence: The part of the email address before the '@' symbol remains exactly the same for all modified contacts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: There are exactly 16 contacts in the Address Book: 6 in the 'Legal' department and 10 in other departments. The target domain for Legal contacts is '@enron-legal.com', while the original domain for all contacts is '@enron.com'.
